locations.name: Perović (Arslanagić) bridge
locations.description: The most famous monument from the Ottoman period in Trebinje and has a very important place in Balkan architecture of 16th century. Mehmed-Pasha Sokolović built the bridge 1574 in honor to his son who was killed in the battle with Venice.

locations.name: Old Town
locations.description: Trebinje's Old Town, known as Kastel, is a charming historical district nestled along the banks of the Trebišnjica River. Built in the 18th century, its narrow stone streets, traditional Ottoman-style architecture, and well-preserved fortifications transport visitors back in time. It's a peaceful spot, perfect for strolling and soaking in the history and beauty of Trebinje.

locations.name: Old Town Fountain
locations.description: Glass panels surrounding the fountain reveal archaeological remains uncovered during recent restoration works, creating a fascinating view of the city's history. The fountain was built as a tribute to the historic fountain that once stood on this site and the legacy of Jovan Dučić, one of Trebinje's most celebrated citizens

locations.name: Platani
locations.description: The iconic plane trees of Trebinje are among the city's most recognizable symbols. According to a local legend, Austro-Hungarian commander Baron Babić planted 16 plane trees in memory of his daughter, who passed away at the age of sixteen. Today, their magnificent canopies provide shade in the heart of the city to many cafes and people walking by.

locations.name: Green Market
locations.description: Visitors can browse fresh fruits and vegetables, local honey, wines, cheeses, herbs, and other authentic Herzegovinian products while experiencing the vibrant atmosphere of daily life in Trebinje.

locations.name: City of Sun - Water and Dino park
locations.description: Guests can indulge in various amenities, such as a spa, swimming pools, and sports facilities. The complex also features charming walking paths and stunning views of the surrounding hills, making it an ideal destination for families and couples seeking a peaceful retreat in nature. Find out more: here
